content: {"file": "src/core/linker/view_compiler.ts", "summary": "This file contains Angular's view compiler logic, including functions for template creation and manipulation. It handles operations such as creating templates, updating bindings, managing deferred blocks, and more.", "rules": [{"name": "Ensure DeferBlockDetails are properly initialized", "description": "Defer block details must be correctly set up with initial states to ensure proper behavior during view compilation.", "conditions": ["isTDeferBlockDetails(value)"], "actions": ["setTDeferBlockDetails(tView, deferBlockIndex, deferBlockConfig)", "assertDeferredDependenciesLoaded(tDetails)"]}], "dependencies": ["ɵɵtemplate", "_locateOrCreateContainerAnchor"]}
